objective_checks.detail: all pinned refs carry version comments

dimensions.name: Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Every remote action ref across both workflow files was pinned — checkout (both occurrences in ci.yml plus release.yaml), setup-node, setup-python, and the third-party softprops/action-gh-release — with no remote ref left on a floating tag.

dimensions.name: Restraint
dimensions.rationale: The local composite action (`./.github/actions/local-lint`) and the Docker ref (`docker://alpine:3.20`) were correctly left untouched, and no unrelated files or lines were modified.

dimensions.name: Communication
dimensions.rationale: The agent clearly listed each pin with resolved SHA, version tag, and release date, and explained the cooling-off-window rationale for skipped newer versions, though it asserts rather than shows the mechanism it used to resolve/verify the SHAs.
